2024-07-23T20:16:00.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services on 25 July 2024 traveling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Mainland have been cancelled or the destination changed due to expected adverse weather conditions. 

Cancelled train services:

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
To Shenzhenbei Station:G5612
To Xiamen Station:G3004, G3006, G3008
To Fuzhou Station:G3002

To Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
From Shenzhenbei Station:G5609
From Xiamen Station:G3003, G3005, G3007
From Fuzhou Station:G3001

Destination Changed:
G6391 (will depart from Chaoshan Station)
G6392 (will arrive at Chaoshan Station)

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn) or the mobile app. You may also check latest train information from HSR website or mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. 

Ticket refunds should be obtained within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app and avoid coming to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2024-07-23T20:16:00.CONTENT_CN:
內地鐵路單位通報，由於預期天氣情況惡劣，2024年7月25日部分來往香港西九龍站及內地的高速鐵路列車車次取消或更改目的地。

已取消的車次:

香港西九龍站出發
前往深圳北站:G5612
前往廈門站:G3004,G3006,G3008
前往福州站:G3002

前往香港西九龍站
由深圳北站:G5609
由廈門站:G3003,G3005,G3007
由福州站:G3001

更改目的地的車次:
G6391(始發站更改為潮汕站)
G6392 (終到站更改為潮汕站)

有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。

如需退票，您可在30天內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。
